title: sideritis linearifolia var. javalambrensis
intro: Sideritis linearifolia var. javalambrensis, also known as Javalambre Sideritis, is a subspecies of Sideritis linearifolia, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Spain. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Javalambre Sideritis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Javalambre Sideritis are often made into teas, infusions, or supplements, and are used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
